templates.name: ⚡ 에너지 (Energy)
templates.desc: 빠른 템포로 매력 포인트를 보여주는 인물 배제 홍보 영상
templates.visual_keywords: Hyper-realistic everyday setting, vibrant and highly appetizing, sizzling hot, messy but delicious, deep rich colors, steam rising intensely, relatable local restaurant vibe, visceral visual impact
templates.camera_angle: Extreme Close-up penetrating the food, Dynamic P.O.V panning, Fast handheld shake
templates.lens_optical_effects: Wide-angle macro lens, Shallow depth of field focusing strictly on the most appetizing part, Fast Shutter Speed, Dolly Zoom for visceral impact
templates.sns_marketing_hook: 0-2s SCROLL STOPPER: Start with a hyper-realistic, overwhelmingly close macro shot of the food's best feature (boiling, sizzling, dripping). It must feel so real the viewer can smell it. Relatable over cinematic perfection.
templates.negative_prompt: eating, chewing, artificial studio lighting, overly clean, fake, plastic, text overlay, subtitles, watermark
templates.food_focus_rule: PRODUCT + KOREAN REACTION. Focus on the visceral, raw appeal of the food. If a human is shown, they MUST be a typical local Korean adult showing an amazed reaction or pointing at the food. NO EATING OR CHEWING.

templates.name: 👑 프리미엄 (Premium)
templates.desc: 차분한 템포로 고급스러운 이미지를 강조하는 인물 배제 영상
templates.visual_keywords: Sophisticated but hyper-realistic, dark moody background, focused spotlight on texture, glossy sauce reflections, pristine plating but looking irresistibly edible, upscale dining vibe
templates.camera_angle: Medium close-up shifting to Extreme Close-up, Slow graceful pan, Eye-level aesthetic angle
templates.lens_optical_effects: Telephoto lens (85mm), Extreme Bokeh, Soft cinematic glow but tack-sharp focus on the food texture, Slow Motion (120fps)
templates.sns_marketing_hook: HIGH-END PRESTIGE AD: Start with a hypnotic, slow-motion macro shot revealing the intricate texture of the dish. It should feel luxurious but ultimately make the viewer intensely crave the food.
templates.negative_prompt: eating, chewing, cheap plastic, messy background, bright fluorescent lights, text overlay, subtitles
templates.food_focus_rule: PRODUCT + KOREAN REACTION. Emphasize the exquisite texture and high-end aura of the food. If a human is shown, they MUST be a typical local Korean adult showing an amazed reaction or pointing at the food. NO EATING.

templates.name: ☕ 무드 (Mood)
templates.desc: 잔잔한 분위기와 스토리 중심으로 감성을 담은 인물 배제 영상
templates.visual_keywords: Cozy, warm relatable setting, Instagram aesthetic but hyper-realistic texture, gentle steam, sunlight hitting the food organically, rustic or relatable local cafe/restaurant textures
templates.camera_angle: Intimate close-up, Dutch angle for artistic everyday feel, Subtle slow zoom-in
templates.lens_optical_effects: Standard lens (50mm), Soft organic focus, Vintage film warmth, Gentle light bleed, Time-lapse of steam or melting
templates.sns_marketing_hook: AUTHENTIC STORYTELLING: Focus heavily on the sensory details that evoke comfort and craving (warm steam, melting textures, golden sunlight). It must feel like a deeply relatable, comforting moment.
templates.negative_prompt: eating, chewing, harsh studio lights, overly staged, text overlay, subtitles, aggressive camera movements
templates.food_focus_rule: PRODUCT + KOREAN REACTION. Focus on the emotional warmth and pure craving evoked by the food's texture. If a human is shown, they MUST be a typical local Korean adult showing an amazed reaction or pointing at the food. NO EATING.
